issue_title: fix(styles): prevent scrollbar width shift when toggling themes
issue_body_preview:
## PR Checklist
Please check if your PR fulfills the following requirements:

- [x] The commit message follows our guidelines: https://github.com/nestjs/docs.nestjs.com/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md


## PR Type
What kind of change does this PR introduce?

<!-- Please check the one that app
test_description_zh: 在文档首页（或任意页面）切换亮色/暗色主题，观察页面整体布局是否发生水平方向的抖动或位移，特别关注滚动条出现/消失时页面内容区域的宽度变化。
expected_result_zh: 切换主题时页面内容区域不应产生水平方向的抖动或宽度跳变，滚动条的显示/隐藏不会导致布局偏移，页面保持稳定。
